content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "去過臺北嗎？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，你以前去過臺北嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, nǐ yǐqián qùguò Táiběi ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, ni3 yi3qian2 qu4guo4 Tai2bei3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, have you been to Taipei before?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 예전에 타이베이에 가본 적이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有啊，我去過好幾次。臺北很漂亮，我喜歡淡水跟九份。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu a, wǒ qùguò hǎo jǐ cì. Táiběi hěn piàoliang, wǒ xǐhuān Dànshuǐ gēn Jiǔfèn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 a, wo3 qu4guo4 hao3 ji3 ci4. Tai2bei3 hen3 piao4liang, wo3 xi3huan1 Dan4shui3 gen1 Jiu3fen4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I've been there several times. Taipei is very beautiful, I like Tamsui and Jiufen.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 여러 번 가봤어요. 타이베이는 정말 예뻐요, 단수이와 주펀을 좋아해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你吃過臺北的夜市小吃嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ chīguò Táiběi de yèshì xiǎochī ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 chi1guo4 Tai2bei3 de ye4shi4 xiao3chi1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Have you tried the night market snacks in Taipei?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 타이베이 야시장 간식을 먹어본 적이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "吃過！我最喜歡滷肉飯跟珍珠奶茶，很好吃。",
          "pinyin": "Chīguò! Wǒ zuì xǐhuān lǔròufàn gēn zhēnzhū nǎichá, hěn hǎochī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Chi1guo4! Wo3 zui4 xi3huan1 lu3rou4fan4 gen1 zhen1zhu1 nai3cha2, hen3 hao3chi1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I have! I love braised pork rice and bubble tea the most, they're delicious.",
          "translation_ko": "먹어봤어요! 루로우판과 버블티를 가장 좋아해요, 정말 맛있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "聽起來很好玩。我從來沒有去過臺北，下次想去看看。",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlái hěn hǎowán. Wǒ cónglái méiyǒu qùguò Táiběi, xià cì xiǎng qù kànkan.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 hao3wan2. Wo3 cong2lai2 mei2you3 qu4guo4 Tai2bei3, xia4 ci4 xiang3 qu4 kan4kan.",
          "translation_en": "That sounds fun. I've never been to Taipei, I want to go next time.",
          "translation_ko": "재미있을 것 같아요. 저는 타이베이에 가본 적이 한 번도 없어서, 다음에 가보고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你一定要去！我可以幫你介紹好玩的地方。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ yīdìng yào qù! Wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ jièshào hǎowán de dìfang.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 yi1ding4 yao4 qu4! Wo3 ke3yi3 bang1 ni3 jie4shao4 hao3wan2 de di4fang.",
          "translation_en": "You must go! I can help introduce you to fun places.",
          "translation_ko": "꼭 가보세요! 제가 재미있는 곳을 소개해 드릴게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Has person B been to Taipei?",
          "question_ko": "B는 타이베이에 가본 적이 있나요?",
          "options_en": ["Yes, several times", "No, never", "Only once"],
          "options_ko": ["네, 여러 번", "아니요, 한 번도 없어요", "한 번만"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '去過' and '吃過'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about a place you have been to in Taiwan. Use '去過' in your answer."
    },
    {
      "title": "你吃過牛肉麵嗎？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你吃過臺灣的牛肉麵嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ chīguò Táiwān de niúròumiàn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 chi1guo4 Tai2wan1 de niu2rou4mian4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Have you tried Taiwanese beef noodle soup?",
          "translation_ko": "대만의 소고기 국수를 먹어본 적이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "吃過一次，很好吃！湯很濃，肉很軟。",
          "pinyin": "Chīguò yī cì, hěn hǎochī! Tāng hěn nóng, ròu hěn ruǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Chi1guo4 yi1 ci4, hen3 hao3chi1! Tang1 hen3 nong2, rou4 hen3 ruan3.",
          "translation_en": "I've tried it once, it's delicious! The broth is rich and the meat is tender.",
          "translation_ko": "한 번 먹어봤는데 정말 맛있어요! 국물이 진하고 고기가 부드러워요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你喝過臺南的牛肉湯嗎？聽說也很棒。",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ hēguò Táinán de niúròutāng ma? Tīngshuō yě hěn bàng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 he1guo4 Tai2nan2 de niu2rou4tang1 ma? Ting1shuo1 ye3 hen3 bang4.",
          "translation_en": "Have you tried Tainan's beef soup? I heard it's also great.",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 타이난의 소고기 국물은 마셔본 적이 있나요? 듣기로도 아주 좋다고 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒有，我從來沒有喝過。但是我很想試試看。",
          "pinyin": "Méiyǒu, wǒ cónglái méiyǒu hēguò. Dànshì wǒ hěn xiǎng shìshì kàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2you3, wo3 cong2lai2 mei2you3 he1guo4. Dan4shi4 wo3 hen3 xiang3 shi4shi4 kan4.",
          "translation_en": "No, I've never had it. But I really want to try it.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 한 번도 마셔본 적이 없어요. 그런데 꼭 한번 먹어보고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我推薦你去臺南，那邊的牛肉湯很新鮮。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ tuījiàn nǐ qù Táinán, nàbiān de niúròutāng hěn xīnxiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 tui1jian4 ni3 qu4 Tai2nan2, na4bian1 de niu2rou4tang1 hen3 xin1xian1.",
          "translation_en": "I recommend you go to Tainan, the beef soup there is very fresh.",
          "translation_ko": "타이난에 가보시길 추천해요, 거기 소고기 국물이 아주 신선해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊，下次去臺南我一定要吃吃看。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, xià cì qù Táinán wǒ yīdìng yào chī chī kàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a, xia4 ci4 qu4 Tai2nan2 wo3 yi1ding4 yao4 chi1 chi1 kan4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, next time I go to Tainan I'll definitely try it.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 다음에 타이난에 가면 꼭 먹어볼게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What has person B never had?",
          "question_ko": "B는 무엇을 마셔본 적이 없나요?",
          "options_en": ["Beef noodle soup", "Tainan beef soup", "Bubble tea"],
          "options_ko": ["소고기 국수", "타이난 소고기 국물", "버블티"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the pronunciation of '吃過' and '喝過'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about a food you have tried in Taiwan. Use '吃過' or '喝過'."
    },
    {
      "title": "從來沒有去過海邊",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你去過墾丁的海邊嗎？聽說那邊的風景很漂亮。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ qùguò Kěndīng de hǎibiān ma? Tīngshuō nàbiān de fēngjǐng hěn piàoliang.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 qu4guo4 Ken3ding1 de hai3bian1 ma? Ting1shuo1 na4bian1 de feng1jing3 hen3 piao4liang.",
          "translation_en": "Have you been to the beach in Kenting? I heard the scenery there is beautiful.",
          "translation_ko": "컨딩 해변에 가본 적이 있나요? 거기 풍경이 아름답다고 들었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒有，我從來沒有去過海邊。我都在臺北生活。",
          "pinyin": "Méiyǒu, wǒ cónglái méiyǒu qùguò hǎibiān. Wǒ dōu zài Táiběi shēnghuó.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2you3, wo3 cong2lai2 mei2you3 qu4guo4 hai3bian1. Wo3 dou1 zai4 Tai2bei3 sheng1huo2.",
          "translation_en": "No, I've never been to the beach. I've always lived in Taipei.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 저는 해변에 가본 적이 한 번도 없어요. 항상 타이베이에서 살았어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "真的嗎？那你應該去一次。墾丁的海邊很好玩。",
          "pinyin": "Zhēn de ma? Nà nǐ yīnggāi qù yī cì. Kěndīng de hǎibiān hěn hǎowán.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhen1 de ma? Na4 ni3 ying1gai1 qu4 yi1 ci4. Ken3ding1 de hai3bian1 hen3 hao3wan2.",
          "translation_en": "Really? Then you should go once. The beach in Kenting is very fun.",
          "translation_ko": "정말요? 그럼 한 번 가보셔야 해요. 컨딩 해변은 정말 재미있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我也很想，但是最近工作很忙，沒有時間。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yě hěn xiǎng, dànshì zuìjìn gōngzuò hěn máng, méiyǒu shíjiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 ye3 hen3 xiang3, dan4shi4 zui4jin4 gong1zuo4 hen3 mang2, mei2you3 shi2jian1.",
          "translation_en": "I really want to, but I've been busy with work lately and don't have time.",
          "translation_ko": "저도 정말 가고 싶지만, 요즘 일이 너무 바빠서 시간이 없어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒關係，等你有空的時候再去。你可以先看照片。",
          "pinyin": "Méiguānxi, děng nǐ yǒu kòng de shíhou zài qù. Nǐ kěyǐ xiān kàn zhàopiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2guan1xi, deng3 ni3 you3 kong4 de shi2hou zai4 qu4. Ni3 ke3yi3 xian1 kan4 zhao4pian4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, go when you have free time. You can look at photos first.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 시간이 날 때 가면 돼요. 먼저 사진을 보셔도 돼요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好主意！我從來沒有看過墾丁的照片，等一下來看看。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo zhǔyì! Wǒ cónglái méiyǒu kànguò Kěndīng de zhàopiàn, děng yīxià lái kànkan.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 zhu3yi4! Wo3 cong2lai2 mei2you3 kan4guo4 Ken3ding1 de zhao4pian4, deng3 yi1xia4 lai2 kan4kan.",
          "translation_en": "Good idea! I've never seen photos of Kenting, I'll take a look later.",
          "translation_ko": "좋은 생각이에요! 컨딩 사진을 본 적이 한 번도 없어서, 잠시 후에 한번 볼게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What has person B never done?",
          "question_ko": "B는 무엇을 한 번도 해본 적이 없나요?",
          "options_en": ["Been to the beach", "Eaten beef noodle soup", "Been to Taipei"],
          "options_ko": ["해변에 가본 적", "소고기 국수를 먹어본 적", "타이베이에 가본 적"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the phrase '從來沒有' and the tone of '去過'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about something you have never done in Taiwan. Use '從來沒有' in your answer."
    }
  ]
}
